biography.text: JKT48 is AKB48's first overseas sister group

data.description: Hi, I'm Sisca JKT48, My type of music, especially with a cup of tea and alternate universe stories. enjoy !
data.name: JKT48 Sisca [Sislounge]

data.description: Hi, I'm Gita JKT48. So if a one-sided love is still love, then I am in love.
data.name: JKT48 Gita [One Sided Love Huh?]

data.description: Hai! Aku Freya JKT48, playlist yang aku buat ini seperti cerita yang bisa kalian imajinasikan sendiri hehe. Semoga kalian suka yaa, selamat mendengarkan!♡
data.name: JKT48 Freya [Jettokōsutā]

data.description: Hi, I'm Jinan JKT48,  Sometimes, life can be difficult but music can make it easier"
data.name: JKT48 Jinan [Songs To Lit Up My Mood]

data.description: Hi, I'm Anin JKT48, I love you, in that place between music and sleep. enjoy!
data.name: JKT48 Anin [Sleep well, you.]

data.description: Hi, I'm Flora JKT48. Here is some calming songs that help me fall asleep. enjoy!
data.name: JKT48 Flora [Ga Bisa Tidur]

data.description: Hi, I'm Ashel JKT48, This is for you who are far away, let's listen to this song together while gazing at the stars! Enjoy!!
data.name: JKT48 Ashel [Stargazing, Make a Wish]

data.description: Hi, I'm Jesslyn JKT48, Happiness can be found, even in the darkest of times, if one only remembers to turn on the light. - A.D
data.name: JKT48 Jesslyn [Lumos]

data.description: Hi, I’m Feni JKT48,  welcome to my 24/7 playlist~! These are some of the songs I've been listening lately, please enjoy it!
data.name: JKT48 Feni [24/7]

data.description: Hi, I'm Indah JKT48, You've worked hard. A warm hug in a form of a playlist, enjoy! :)
data.name: JKT48 Indah [Healing Station]

data.description: 📖Musik untuk Belajar Lagu-lagu galau yang menghantam hati. Untuk malam sunyi, pikiran berat, dan perasaan yang tak sempat terucap.
